_comment: Sample API payloads for PolicyMind-AI. Each entry shows the HTTP method, endpoint, and request body. Example responses show the full trust-layer structure returned by the server.

ingest_text.description: Ingest a policy document from raw text (no download required).

body.text: The National Climate Strategy 2030 commits all signatory states to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by 55 percent relative to 1990 levels by 31 December 2030. Article 4 mandates a minimum 30 percent renewable energy share by 2025, rising to 65 percent by 2030. A Just Transition Fund of EUR 15 billion is established for 2025 to 2030, governed by a Board of member state representatives and independent experts. The European Commission shall publish annual compliance reports by 31 March each year. Non-compliant states may face suspension of Fund access and preferential trade arrangements.
body.title: National Climate Strategy 2030

ingest_url.description: Ingest a publicly accessible PDF or plain-text document by URL. The URL must not require authentication. Users are responsible for complying with the source document's licensing terms.

query_basic.description: Simple question answered across all ingested documents.

body.question: What are the key emission reduction commitments for 2030?

query_with_graph.description: Question with knowledge-graph evidence included in retrieval scoring.

body.question: What role does the Just Transition Fund play?

query_filtered.description: Question restricted to a single document and limited to 3 retrieved chunks.

query_no_graph.description: Disable graph expansion for faster, vector-only retrieval.

body.question: What renewable energy targets are specified?

query_multihop.description: Multi-hop graph expansion (depth=2). Collects edges from 1-hop neighbours of matched entities in addition to direct edges. Useful when policy relationships span multiple entity-entity links (e.g. agency → programme → deadline). Indirect evidence is included with confidence discounted by 0.8.

body.question: Which agencies are responsible for just transition enforcement?

graph_neighbours.description: Retrieve entities within 1–3 hops of a named entity.

list_documents.description: List all documents currently indexed in the vector store.

ingest_response.description: Successful ingestion of the sample climate text above.

query_response_cited.description: Successful cited answer. All trust-layer fields are present. answer_type='cited' means confidence >= 0.35 and no refusal phrase detected.

body.question: What emission reduction target is committed for 2030?
body.answer: [MOCK ANSWER] Based on 1 retrieved passage(s) (p.1), the policy corpus contains relevant information about: 'What emission reduction target is committed for 2030?'. Key excerpt: "The National Climate Strategy 2030 commits all signatory states to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by 55 percent...". For a complete, synthesised answer, configure a real LLM provider via LLM_PROVIDER=anthropic or LLM_PROVIDER=openai.
body.confidence_note: Derived from 1 retrieved passage (mean top-3 cosine similarity: 0.61), without graph evidence. Evidence quality is moderate — verify key claims against the source.

citations.excerpt: The National Climate Strategy 2030 commits all signatory states to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by 55 percent relative to 1990 levels by 31 December 2030...

retrieved_chunks.text: The National Climate Strategy 2030 commits all signatory states to reduce greenhouse gas emissions by 55 percent relative to 1990 levels by 31 December 2030. Article 4 mandates a minimum 30 percent renewable energy share by 2025, rising to 65 percent by 2030. A Just Transition Fund of EUR 15 billion is established...

limitations: Mock LLM provider active — responses are deterministic stubs. Set LLM_PROVIDER=anthropic or LLM_PROVIDER=openai for real answers.
No graph evidence matched this query. The retrieved passages may not contain recognised named entities.

query_response_no_corpus.description: Refusal when no documents are indexed (or none match the query). The LLM is never called — the pipeline refuses before generation to prevent hallucination.

body.question: What emission reduction target is committed for 2030?
body.answer: The available documents do not contain enough information to answer this question. No relevant passages were found in the indexed corpus. Please ingest the relevant policy documents and retry.
body.confidence_note: No passages were retrieved from the corpus. Confidence cannot be assessed — the response is a refusal.
limitations: Mock LLM provider active — responses are deterministic stubs. Set LLM_PROVIDER=anthropic or LLM_PROVIDER=openai for real answers.
No relevant passages were found in the corpus. Ingest more documents or broaden the question.

graph_stats_response.description: Graph statistics after ingesting the sample climate document with spaCy installed.

answer_type_reference._comment: Quick reference for the answer_type field values.
answer_type_reference.cited: Answer is grounded in retrieved passages at adequate confidence (>= 0.35).
answer_type_reference.partial: Evidence found but weak or incomplete — confidence < 0.35, or LLM used the 'Based on limited evidence:' prefix.
answer_type_reference.refused: LLM judged the retrieved context insufficient and declined to answer.
answer_type_reference.no_corpus: No passages were retrieved — LLM was not called. Ingest relevant documents first.

evidence_quality_reference._comment: Quick reference for the evidence_quality field values.
